# Alpert Schreyer Personal Injury Lawyers

> Personal injury and DUI attorneys serving all of Maryland. Over 125 years of combined experience and more than $100 million recovered for clients. Free consultation.

## Offices
- Waldorf Office: 8 Post Office Rd, Waldorf, MD 20602 — (301) 932-9997
- Lanham Office: 4600 Forbes Boulevard #200, Lanham, MD 20706 — (301) 936-0011
- Frederick Office: 25 E Patrick St, Frederick, MD 21701 — (301) 381-1993
- Rockville Office: 11140 Rockville Pike Suite 550-J, Rockville, MD 20852 — (301) 364-3195

## Notes
- Prior results do not guarantee a similar outcome.
- Contacting the firm does not create an attorney-client relationship.
- Maryland follows strict contributory negligence: 1% fault can bar recovery.
